lms_data.question: Jim's father is a (1) .................. office worker, sometimes he gets home very late in the evening.
Jim's mother is very (2) .................. , she always helps everyone in the family.
Jim's sister is (3) .................., she usually gets good grades at school.
Jim is (4) .................., his family always laugh at his jokes!
Jim's family has four people. Jim's father is a hard-working office worker. Jim's mother is very kind. Jim's sister is clever. Jim is funny, his family always laugh at his jokes!
